# maulmann.de

> Private Archive und Showcase of the ultimate Juwan Howard Super Collector Card Collection.

This file is used to guide the LLM on how to understand content for the website.

## Core Content
- [Home](https://www.maulmann.de/): Central entry point for the entire Juwean Howard Private Collection and its contents.
- [Juwan Howard Private Collection](https://www.maulmann.de/Juwan-Howard-Collection.html): Complete checklist for over 1000 unique Juwan Howard Basketball Cards and Parallels.
- [Baseball Private Collection](https://www.maulmann.de/Baseball.html): Gallery of 2005 Upper Deck Ultimate Signature Edition Baseball Cards und Autographs.
- [Exquisite Flawless Private Collection](https://www.maulmann.de/Flawless.html): Presentation of ultra rare 2008 Upper Deck Exquisite Flawless Basketball Cards and 1/1.
- [Panini Flawless](https://www.maulmann.de/Panini.html): Private Collection of 2012-13 Panini Flawless Basketball Cards und Masterpieces.

## Knowledge
- [Wantlist](https://www.maulmann.de/Wantlist.html): List of all Juwan Howard Cards, PMGs und 1/1s that are still missing.
